disclaimer: Testimonials reflect individual experiences. Results may vary.

items.name: Aeryn S.
items.quote: The spa itself is very inviting, and the staff are very welcoming and friendly. I highly recommend Glo de Vie.

items.name: Sylvia M.
items.quote: I really cannot say enough good things about this place. Everyone that works there is incredibly nice, professional, and attentive.

items.name: Tina
items.quote: The staff is knowledgeable, friendly and professional. They right away put you at ease and make your experience there a very pleasant one.
